--- Merfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 2/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
